---
title: "Grants"
---

```{r}
library(lubridate)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)

source("R/data.R")
d <- seec_read_data()

updated <- with_tz(Sys.time(), "Africa/Johannesburg")
```

**Last updated:** `r format(updated, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z")`

```{r}
# Clean + filter grants (keep 2019+; show yearly amounts 2019–2024)
grantlist_mod <- d$grantlist %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(`End Year`) %>%
  rename(`Project Name` = Funder) %>%
  mutate(
    `Start Year` = suppressWarnings(as.integer(`Start Year`)),
    `End Year`   = suppressWarnings(as.integer(`End Year`)),
    `Start and End` = paste0(`Start Year`, " - ", `End Year`)
  ) %>%
  filter(`End Year` >= 2019) %>%
  select(
    `Project Name`,
    `Grant holder`,
    `Start and End`,
    matches("^2019$|^202[0-4]$")
  )

# Ensure year columns are numeric (handles commas/currency/blank)
year_cols <- names(grantlist_mod)[4:ncol(grantlist_mod)]
grantlist_mod <- grantlist_mod %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(year_cols), ~ readr::parse_number(as.character(.x))))

# Totals row
totals <- grantlist_mod %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(year_cols), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  mutate(`Project Name` = "Total", `Grant holder` = "", `Start and End` = "") %>%
  select(names(grantlist_mod))

grantlist_mod_with_totals <- bind_rows(grantlist_mod, totals)

# Format year columns for display (no scientific notation; blanks for NA)
grantlist_display <- grantlist_mod_with_totals %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(year_cols), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "", format(.x, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE))))

# Use the numeric version BEFORE you add the totals row
grants_yearly <- grantlist_mod %>%
  select(all_of(year_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "year", values_to = "amount") %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(year)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(amount, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year)

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

ggplot(grants_yearly, aes(x = year, y = total)) +
    geom_col() +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = ",")) +
    labs(title = "Total grant funding per year", x = NULL, y = "Total funding")

```


```{r}
DT::datatable(
  grantlist_display,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel"),
    pageLength = 25,
    scrollX = TRUE
  ),
  width = "100%"
)
```
